role: Unit test suite for ArchSpine's infrastructure layer, covering configuration, credentials, database, document handling, LLM integration, manifest, MCP, git hooks, repository strategy, and rules loading.
responsibility: Collectively, these tests validate the correctness, error handling, and integration of key infrastructure modules to ensure reliable operation of the ArchSpine mirror system.

children.role: Unit test suite for the configuration validation module of ArchSpine.
Test suite for the Config configuration management class.
Vitest test suite for the WindowsDPAPIBackend credential backend, verifying secure secret passing via stdin in PowerShell execution.
Vitest test suite verifying the behavior of CredentialBackend, WindowsDPAPIBackend, and CredentialStore implementations.
Test suite for database infrastructure modules, validating schema initialization and table structure.
Unit test suite for the document language choices module (getDocumentLanguageChoices and associated constants).
Vitest test suite for schema enforcement of the index-reader module.

Vitest-based test suite for verifying the Writer Boundary Layer (facade-based import rules). Ensures that internal modules within a directory can only be imported through a designated facade file, and validates that importers are explicitly allowed.
Vitest test suite for the resolveLLMSettings function and credential backend availability behavior.
Vitest test suite exercising LLM provider utility functions (parseMarkdownBlocks, parseStructuredResponse, and related helpers).
Vitest structural contract test for the LLM Facade module (`src/infra/llm.ts`). Validates that the module exports all required public symbols and that none are undefined.
Vitest unit test suite for the Manifest class, validating its initialization, serialization/deserialization, state management, and integration with SpineDB.
Test suite for the SpineTools MCP module, validating tool definitions, resource handlers, and context enrichment.
Vitest test suite validating the pre-commit git hook configuration loading, resolution, and installation logic.
Test suite for the repository strategy drift detection logic in src/cli/repo/strategy.ts.
Unit test suite for the rules-loader module validating the loadRulesFromDir function.
